risks.scenario: Developer imports transactions/domain/entities from marketplace/
risks.mitigation: ESLint no-restricted-imports rule, code review checklist enforces boundary check, weekly architecture review

risks.scenario: Producer changes payload shape without version bump; consumer fails to parse
risks.mitigation: Event catalog enforcement, contract tests, Zod schema validation on consume

risks.description: RLS policy gaps expose user data
risks.scenario: New table added without RLS, or policy allows overly broad access
risks.mitigation: RLS mandatory checklist item, integration tests verify unauthorized access blocked, security audit before production

risks.description: Stripe webhook replay creates duplicate payments
risks.scenario: Stripe webhook replayed after timeout, payment processed twice
risks.mitigation: Idempotency keys on all payment operations, webhook deduplication (24h window), reconciliation job validates Stripe vs local state

risks.description: Queue worker crash loop stalls workflows
risks.scenario: Bug in queue worker causes infinite restart loop
risks.mitigation: DLQ after 3 retries, alerting on DLQ growth, manual replay after fix

risks.description: Outbox relay stall breaks eventual consistency
risks.scenario: Outbox relay worker stops polling; events never published
risks.mitigation: Health check 503, backlog alert, auto-restart on failure

risks.description: DB connection pool exhaustion under load
risks.scenario: Load spike consumes all 20 connections
risks.mitigation: Pool limit 20, query timeout 5s, circuit breaker (future), slow query log review

risks.scenario: Algolia indexing falls behind listing updates
risks.mitigation: Indexing backlog monitoring, retry logic with backoff, manual reindex capability

risks.description: Stripe API rate limit during flash sale
risks.scenario: High volume checkout triggers Stripe rate limit
risks.mitigation: Queue rate limiting, exponential backoff, request batching
risks.trigger: Stripe rate limit error code received

risks.scenario: Image upload volume exceeds Gemini quota
risks.mitigation: Skip enrichment on quota exceeded, queue backoff, retry next day
risks.trigger: Alert ai_jobs_failed_total with quota error code

risks.scenario: Attacker brute-forces login credentials
risks.mitigation: Rate limiting, CAPTCHA after 5 failures, account lockout

risks.scenario: .env file or API key committed to git
risks.mitigation: .env in .gitignore, pre-commit hook scanning for secrets, GitHub secret scanning enabled, quarterly key rotation

risks.description: TDD discipline erodes under velocity pressure
risks.scenario: Velocity pressure leads to skipped tests
risks.mitigation: CI blocks merge on test failure, coverage gates (80% line, 70% branch), review checklist enforces test presence

risks.scenario: Direct DB update skips domain state machine logic
risks.mitigation: Unit tests 95%+, integration tests, DB constraints, code review enforces state machine usage

risks.scenario: Transaction complexity exceeds allocated time
risks.mitigation: Fixed 2-week allocation, descope plan ready, sequential agent review for trust-critical code

risks.scenario: High-frequency telemetry emits exceed disk capacity or IOPS limits
risks.mitigation: Retention policies, stream rotation, compression, severity-based sampling

risks.description: Replay system becomes source of truth drift
risks.scenario: Replay interpretation diverges from actual execution semantics
risks.mitigation: Replay is strictly read-only; integrity checksums on all source data; never mutative

risks.scenario: Suggestions guide operators toward destructive actions during degraded states
risks.mitigation: Degraded-state suppression, confidence thresholds, human review gate for high-impact suggestions
risks.trigger: Suggestion with confidence below threshold or during degraded state

risks.description: State machine too rigid for edge cases
risks.scenario: Valid emergency recovery blocked by strict transition guards
risks.mitigation: Emergency transitions with mandatory audit, recovery paths for all states
risks.trigger: Emergency recovery attempt fails due to transition guard

risks.scenario: Automated repair triggers secondary failures in dependent subsystems
risks.mitigation: Reversibility requirement, snapshot before healing, human approval for destructive actions
risks.trigger: Healing action causes new anomalies within 5 minutes

risks.scenario: Critical production issue cannot be patched because readiness gate is not met
risks.mitigation: Emergency bypass with mandatory audit trail, expedited review path
risks.trigger: Hotfix required while readiness gate is red
